title: MedGraphRAG: Towards Safe Medical LLM via Graph RAG

defines.name: MedGraphRAG
defines.definition: A graph-based retrieval-augmented generation framework for the medical domain that improves large language model responses with evidence-based retrieval and source-linked explanations.

problem: Standard RAG and general-purpose GraphRAG are insufficient for medical use because they do not reliably produce evidence-based, source-backed responses and are too costly or complex to adapt directly.
